banner.description: Want a unified view across all networks?

pricing.description: Stay safe in web3 with the tools you need. Upgrade to Premium for the full experience.

multichain_approvals.description: View and manage all your token approvals across 100+ networks from a single unified dashboard. No more switching chains one by one — see everything at a glance and take action instantly.
multichain_approvals.title: Multichain Approvals

multichain_exploit_checker.description: Check your wallets against all known exploits across every supported network. Get a warning if any of your approvals are associated with compromised contracts so you can revoke them immediately.
multichain_exploit_checker.title: Multichain Exploit Checker

multichain_history.description: Access your full approval history across every supported network in one place. Track every approve, revoke, and permission change over time.
multichain_history.title: Multichain History

priority_support.description: Get faster responses from the Revoke.cash team when you need help. Premium subscribers are prioritized in our support queue so you never have to wait long for assistance.
priority_support.title: Priority Support

time_machine.description: Travel back in time to see what your approvals looked like at any point in the past. Use the Time Machine to investigate how your approval state has changed over time across all supported networks.
time_machine.title: Time Machine

unlimited_batch_revokes.description: Revoke multiple token approvals in a single transaction at no extra cost. Free users pay a per-batch fee, but Premium subscribers enjoy unlimited batch revokes across all networks.
unlimited_batch_revokes.title: Unlimited Batch Revokes

tooltips.automated_revoking: Supported on select networks and wallets.

supported_wallets.question: What wallets and networks support automated revoking?
supported_wallets.answer: Automated revoking is an Ultimate feature that currently works with MetaMask on 13 supported networks including Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Base, Optimism, and more. Support for additional wallets depends on adoption of the ERC-7715 standard.

subscription_expiry.question: What happens when my subscription expires?
subscription_expiry.answer: Your multichain dashboard and tools become unavailable until you renew. With Ultimate, automated revoking also stops monitoring your approvals, but your rule configuration is preserved, so everything can pick up where it left off once you resubscribe.

multiple_wallets.question: Can I use one subscription for multiple wallets?
multiple_wallets.answer: Yes. Both Premium and Ultimate include 10 wallet slots. The subscription owner can add wallet addresses and all wallets get the same features. With Ultimate, each wallet can additionally manage its own auto-revoking configuration independently.

premium_vs_ultimate.question: What's the difference between Premium and Ultimate?
premium_vs_ultimate.answer: Premium gives you the full multichain dashboard, approval history, exploit checker, batch revokes, and time machine. Ultimate additionally provides set-and-forget protection with continuous monitoring and automatic revocation of risky or stale approvals.

meta.description: Compare Revoke Premium plans. Get the multichain dashboard, unlimited batch revokes, and more.
meta.title: Premium Pricing

free.description: Essential tools to inspect and revoke token approvals.
free.name: Free

premium.description: Monitor and manage token approvals in a single multichain dashboard.
premium.name: Premium

pricing.title: Premium Pricing
